name: Atmosphere
description: Reducing greenhouse gas emissions and restoring atmospheric balance through clean energy, carbon capture, and policy advocacy.

name: Oceans
description: Protecting ocean ecosystems from pollution, acidification, and overfishing while restoring marine biodiversity.

name: Land
description: Restoring degraded soils, protecting indigenous land rights, and promoting regenerative agriculture at scale.

name: Forests
description: Halting deforestation and funding large-scale reforestation across the world's most critical forest ecosystems.

name: Wildlife
description: Protecting endangered species, restoring habitats, and ending illegal wildlife trade through community-led conservation.

name: Human Rights
description: Supporting frontline communities disproportionately affected by environmental harm and advocating for environmental justice.

name: Human Progress
description: Funding access to clean water, renewable energy, and sustainable infrastructure in underserved communities globally.
